reviews.description: All sidebar links navigate to correct pages

tests.name: Home link navigates to home page
tests.assessment: Correctly verifies navigation away and back to home with proper URL and content assertions

tests.name: Meditation link navigates to session page
tests.assessment: Correctly verifies navigation to /session with session-specific content

tests.name: History link navigates to history page
tests.assessment: Correctly verifies navigation to /history with history-specific content

tests.name: Profile link navigates to profile page
tests.assessment: Correctly verifies navigation to /profile with profile-specific content

tests.name: Settings link navigates to settings page
tests.assessment: Correctly verifies navigation to /settings with settings-specific content

tests.name: can navigate to all pages and return home
tests.assessment: End-to-end navigation flow test covering all pages sequentially

reviews.description: Active page is highlighted in sidebar

tests.name: only one nav item is active at a time
tests.assessment: Correctly verifies active class presence/absence on all nav items. Uses .HaveClass() assertion with navigation__link--active class. Properly checks that only one item is active.

tests.name: active state persists during session
tests.assessment: Verifies active state persists after starting session and after page reload

tests.name: bottom nav is visible at mobile viewport
tests.assessment: Verifies nav position at bottom of screen using boundingBox Y coordinate check

tests.name: bottom nav links navigate correctly at mobile
tests.assessment: Verifies navigation works correctly at mobile viewport

tests.name: logout button is not visible in mobile bottom nav
tests.assessment: Correctly verifies logout button absence in mobile nav

tests.name: bottom nav is fixed and does not scroll with content
tests.assessment: Tests fixed positioning by comparing Y coordinates before/after scroll

tests.name: home page is usable at mobile with bottom nav
tests.assessment: Verifies content visibility above bottom nav at mobile viewport

tests.name: settings page works at mobile with bottom nav
tests.assessment: Verifies settings content and bottom nav visibility at mobile

tests.name: home URL shows home content
tests.assessment: Correctly verifies URL and home content match

tests.name: session URL shows session content
tests.assessment: Correctly verifies URL and session content match

tests.name: history URL shows history content
tests.assessment: Correctly verifies URL and history content match

tests.name: profile URL shows profile content
tests.assessment: Correctly verifies URL and profile content match

tests.name: settings URL shows settings content
tests.assessment: Correctly verifies URL and settings content match

tests.name: no content bleeding between pages
tests.assessment: Correctly verifies content isolation between pages using negation assertions

tests.name: sidebar stays fixed at top when scrolling
tests.assessment: Uses mouse.wheel() for scroll simulation and verifies nav Y position remains 0

tests.name: sidebar covers full height on desktop
tests.assessment: Correctly verifies sidebar height equals viewport height

tests.name: sidebar is sticky on session page with active session
tests.assessment: Verifies sticky behavior during active session with scroll

tests.name: logout button is always visible in sticky sidebar
tests.assessment: Verifies logout button visibility after scrolling

crossCuttingTests.name: layout adapts correctly when resizing viewport
crossCuttingTests.assessment: Tests responsive behavior across desktop/tablet/mobile breakpoints

crossCuttingTests.name: navigation state is correct after direct URL access
crossCuttingTests.assessment: Verifies active state when using page.goto() directly

crossCuttingTests.name: back navigation works correctly
crossCuttingTests.assessment: Tests browser back button and active state cleanup

summary: All 27 tests pass. Navigation tests are well-structured with proper test isolation using createAuthenticatedPage helper. Active state assertions use correct CSS class name (navigation__link--active). Mobile viewport tests correctly verify bottom nav behavior. Sticky sidebar tests use proper scroll simulation. No silent error suppression. Tests are deterministic and properly isolated.
